decisionId.description: Stable decision id (deterministic, derived from the checked tuple — no wall-clock/RNG).

context.description: The attribute context supplied to the decision.

reason.description: Human/machine-readable reason — the granting relation path, or why it was denied.

description:
One **authorization decision-log** entry (doc 06 §2.4, ADR-0010) — mandatory for every PDP decision.
Feeds both compliance audit and the UI "why is this hidden" explanation surface, and joins the
DecisionRecord. The `reason` is the relation/rule path that granted access, or the denial reason.
